scripts.start: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml --profile tools up -d && docker compose -p grenmet-api -f apps/api/fastapi/docker-compose.yml up
scripts.stop: docker compose -p grenmet-api -f apps/api/fastapi/docker-compose.yml down --remove-orphans && docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml --profile tools down
scripts.reset: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml --profile tools down -v && docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up postgres -d
scripts.status: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml --profile tools ps && docker compose -p grenmet-api -f apps/api/fastapi/docker-compose.yml ps
scripts.openapi:export: cd apps/api/fastapi && uv run python scripts/export_openapi.py
scripts.generate:api-client: pnpm run openapi:export && turbo run generate --filter=@grenmet/api-client
